page.landing.description: A platform for learning and mentoring
landing.hero.title: Learning of the future — already here.
landing.hero.subtitle: UniMentor is a personalized platform that adapts to your pace, maps your skills and guides you through difficult concepts with a Socratic AI.
landing.features.description: We combine modern pedagogy and AI to make learning more effective.
landing.feature.socratic.title: Socratic AI
landing.feature.socratic.desc: Our AI asks guiding questions instead of giving ready answers, helping you learn deeper.
landing.feature.matrix.title: Skills Matrix
landing.feature.matrix.desc: A live competence profile — track growth with an interactive radar.
landing.feature.teacher.title: Teacher Dashboard
landing.feature.teacher.desc: Analytics and tools for instructors: engagement, at-risk students and AI insights.
landing.how.step1.title: Enroll in a course
landing.how.step1.desc: Choose from hundreds of IT, design and business courses in our catalog.
landing.how.step2.title: Chat with the AI tutor
landing.how.step2.desc: Solve quizzes and ask questions — the AI adapts difficulty to your level.
landing.how.step3.title: Get results
landing.how.step3.desc: Complete your Skills Matrix and earn a professional certificate.
landing.cta.title: Ready to change how you learn?
landing.cta.subtitle: Join UniMentor today and feel the difference from the first lesson.
footer.copy: © 2026 UniMentor Team. Built for the future of HigherEd.
